Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Tokachi | title = [[:en:Tokachi Subprefecture|Tokachi Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[:en:Obihiro|Obihiro]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Ashoro District, Hokkaido|Ashoro District]] **[[:en:Ashoro, Hokkaido|Ashoro]] **[[:en:Rikubetsu, Hokkaido|Rikubetsu]] *[[:en:Hiroo District, Hokkaido|Hiroo District]] **[[:en:Hiroo, Hokkaido|Hiroo]] **[[:en:Taiki, Hokkaido|Taiki]] *[[:en:Kamikawa (Tokachi) District, Hokkaido|Kamikawa District]] **[[:en:Shimizu, Hokkaido|Shimizu]] **[[:en:Shintoku, Hokkaido|Shintoku]] *[[:en:Kasai District, Hokkaido|Kasai District]] **[[:en:Memuro, Hokkaido|Memuro]] **[[:en:Nakasatsunai, Hokkaido|Nakasatsunai]] **[[:en:Sarabetsu, Hokkaido|Sarabetsu]] *[[:en:Katō District, Hokkaido|Katō District]] **[[:en:Kamishihoro, Hokkaido|Kamishihoro]] **[[:en:Otofuke, Hokkaido|Otofuke]] **[[:en:Shihoro, Hokkaido|Shihoro]] **[[:en:Shikaoi, Hokkaido|Shikaoi]] *[[:en:Nakagawa (Tokachi) District, Hokkaido|Nakagawa District]] **[[:en:Honbetsu, Hokkaido|Honbetsu]] **[[:en:Ikeda, Hokkaido|Ikeda]] **[[:en:Makubetsu, Hokkaido|Makubetsu]] **[[:en:Toyokoro, Hokkaido|Toyokoro]] *[[:en:Tokachi District, Hokkaido|Tokachi District]] **[[:en:Urahoro, Hokkaido|Urahoro]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
